intro: A curated set of 18 Recursion problems frequently useful for Amazon interview prep. Focus on patterns, not brute memorization.

faqs.question: How many Recursion problems should I do for Amazon?
faqs.answer: Quality over quantity: master patterns with 15 well-understood problems, then expand.

faqs.question: Where should I start?
faqs.answer: Start Easy/Medium in this list, then tackle Hard variants. Pair with the Recursion topic page and related roadmaps.

seo.title: Best Recursion Questions for Amazon | AlgoForge
seo.description: Top Recursion coding interview questions for Amazon. Practice list, FAQs, and pattern links.
